en.value:
Establish and test the information  web portal –to be based in India
	
		Periodic assessment of labour market information in destination countries (5 times)
	
		Integrated employment services for the national and foreign labour markets will be introduced in two MOLE-job centres in Nepal
	
		Study on labour market assessment in destination countries –
	
		Establish information kiosks and establish a mobile team
	
		Review of existing  pre-departure orientation course  and upgrade it
	
		Support to strengthen: online registration at DOFE and its connection with missions abroad
	
		Study on recruitment cost by country and occupation
	
		Carry out a feasibility study to design a rating mechanism for recruitment agencies in India, Nepal and Pakistan.
	
		Registration of sub-agents in India, Nepal and Pakistan and more effective regulation.
	
		Blue-print and advocacy for reform of the recruitment mechanism in destination countries in GCC.
	
		Assessment of complaints mechanisms in Nepal
	
		Technical support for review of legislations;
	
		TU/NGO Migration resource centre strengthened
	
		Carry out an assessment of job requirements (skills and qualifications)
	
		Consultation to develop a roadmap for better alignment and compatibility between job requirements (skills and qualification) in high demand occupations: construction, hospitality, trade  and domestic work.
	
		Upgrade the capacity of skills training institutes
	
		Include skills recognition in standardised pre-departure training and issue of skills/employment passports
	
		An assessment of trends and patterns in skilled emigration and return
	
		A survey on remittances and financial products to attract savings and economic investments from migrants
	
		Diaspora projects
	
		A pilot programme: creation of a small fund leveraging diaspora contribution to development
	
		An annual survey of key informants to monitor any significant outflows of health professionals from Nepal and corrective measures to be taken if necessary.

executing_agency: International Labour Organization, Ministry of Labour, Employment and Social Security
implementing_agency: International Labour Organization, Ministry of Labour, Employment and Social Security

en.full: Promoting the Effective Governance of Labour Migration from South Asia through Actions on Labour Market Information, Protection during Recruitment and Employment, Skills, and Development Impact (CTR 375260)

sectors.donor_sector: General Economic Commercial and Labor Affairs
sectors.normalized_sector: General Economic Commercial and Labor Affairs

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
